title: Global tech crash amid AI doubts drags down markets
summary: Growing concerns over spending on artificial intelligence and signals from the Fed trigger a massive wave of selling in the tech sector worldwide.

title: Rheinmetall plummets and drags down European defense companies
summary: Rheinmetall shares suffer a sharp drop that spills over to the entire European defense sector.

title: TKMS soars on stock market after receiving major defense contract
summary: German arms company ThyssenKrupp Marine Systems leads gains on the Dax, boosted by a significant order.

title: Brazil approves merger between Saipem and Subsea 7
summary: Brazil's antitrust regulator gives the green light to the merger between the two major offshore oil services companies.

title: Argenx falls on stock market due to results of its myositis drug trial
summary: Biotech company Argenx shares plummet after the update of its clinical trial for the treatment of myositis.

title: Hektas Ticaret falls 6% on stock market after shareholder sells stake
summary: Shares of Turkish company Hektas Ticaret plunge after the sale of a significant stake by one of its main investors.

title: Big Yellow Group leads gains on the UK market
summary: Shares of storage company Big Yellow Group experience a strong rally without an immediate clear corporate catalyst.

title: SpaceX loses more than 600 billion on stock market due to tech crisis
summary: The tech crisis hits SpaceX hard, seeing its market value drastically reduced amid market skepticism.

title: The dollar hits yearly highs against the euro due to monetary policy
summary: The greenback reaches May 2025 levels against the euro, driven by tech sales and the Federal Reserve's roadmap.

title: Tritax Big Box REIT soars in the trading session
summary: Shares of real estate investment trust Tritax Big Box REIT record a sharp intraday rise.

title: Liontrust Asset Management rallies strongly on stock market
summary: Shares of asset manager Liontrust Asset Management experience a notable rebound in their trading price.

title: J.P. Morgan puts Ahold Delhaize on negative watch ahead of its results
summary: The investment bank places distribution giant Ahold Delhaize on negative watch ahead of the publication of its second-quarter results.

title: Alphabet replaces Verizon in the Dow Jones index
summary: Google's parent company, Alphabet, joins the Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon, in a move that reflects the growing weight of technology.

title: SpaceX tests its ability to disrupt the bond market with a historic issuance
summary: SpaceX launches a $25 billion bond issuance, testing investors' appetite for high-yield private credit.

title: Global sovereign bond markets wobble amid uncertainty
summary: Public debt from the United States, United Kingdom, and Germany shows signs of weakness and unease among investors regarding the macroeconomic outlook.

title: Nikkei falls more than 600 points dragged down by global tech crisis
summary: The Tokyo Stock Exchange suffers a sharp correction led by losses in the tech sector and the liquidation of leveraged positions.

title: Fed policies and the future of Social Security set the agenda in the US
summary: New Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh issues warnings on inflation and artificial intelligence, while the COLA adjustment for Social Security in 2027 takes shape.

title: US Senate rebels against Trump and votes to end Iran war over Hormuz crisis
summary: Amid the escalation in the Strait of Hormuz, the US Senate votes to end the Iran war, defying the Trump administration's stance.

title: Venezuela faces the world's largest debt restructuring with 240 billion
summary: The country will reveal a massive liability of $240 billion, in what is shaping up to be the largest sovereign debt restructuring process in history.

title: FedEx sinks on stock market after disappointing with its quarterly results
summary: Shares of the delivery company plummet on Wall Street after publishing quarterly results that fell short of market expectations.
